lines.translation: Now I ask questions
Who is he?
Who claims to be your lover?
I can't understand
When night falls
I want you to be there
Who did you go through with?
I can't understand

lines.original: Aku lelaki tak mungkin menerimamu bila
lines.translation: I'm a man who can't possibly accept you
Turns out you're being ambiguous, making me hurt

lines.original: Tinggalkan saja diriku yang tak mungkin menunggu
lines.translation: Just leave me alone who can't wait

lines.original: Jangan pernah memilih, aku bukan pilihan
lines.translation: Never choose, I'm not an option
Then it was revealed and asked
Is it true now he is?
The woman whose heart I know?
I can't understand

lines.original: Aku lelaki tak mungkin menerimamu bila
lines.translation: I'm a man who can't possibly accept you
Turns out you're being ambiguous, making me hurt

lines.original: Tinggalkan saja diriku yang tak mungkin menunggu
lines.translation: Just leave me alone who can't wait

lines.original: Jangan pernah memilih, aku bukan pilihan
lines.translation: Never choose, I'm not an option
You don't need to choose me
I'm not a man to be chosen
